title: [Uvaldov's Pinions and Cogs]
description: Gears, cogs, and pinions are worked throughout the interior of this heptagonal stall, and it is unclear if the multitude of gizmos and gadgets provide any useful function to the integrity of its structure.  A crooked brass clockwerke table disjointedly follows alongside four of the walls, displaying a variety of weapons.  Dangling from the angular ceiling, seven lanterns glow brightly with green-yellow phosphorescent luminescence.
